tasks.label: Build frontend
tasks.command: cd "E:/test/superM all/super M2/frontend" && npm run build

tasks.label: Start backend dev
tasks.command: cd "E:/test/superM all/super M2/backend" && npm run dev

tasks.label: Start app on 4001
tasks.command: Set-Location -LiteralPath 'E:/test/superM all/super M2/frontend'; npm run build; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Set-Location -LiteralPath 'E:/test/superM all/super M2/backend'; npm run dev

tasks.label: Build frontend
tasks.command: Set-Location "E:/test/superM all/super M2/frontend"; npm run build

tasks.label: Start backend dev
tasks.command: Set-Location "E:/test/superM all/super M2/backend"; npm run dev

tasks.label: Build frontend fixed
tasks.command: Set-Location "E:/test/superM all/super M2/frontend"; npm run build

tasks.label: Start backend dev fixed
tasks.command: Set-Location "E:/test/superM all/super M2/backend"; npm run dev

tasks.label: Build frontend literal
tasks.command: Set-Location -LiteralPath 'E:/test/superM all/super M2/frontend'; npm run build

tasks.label: Start backend dev literal
tasks.command: Set-Location -LiteralPath 'E:/test/superM all/super M2/backend'; npm run dev

tasks.label: Start frontend preview 4175
tasks.command: Set-Location -LiteralPath 'E:/test/superM all/super M2/frontend'; npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4175 --strictPort

tasks.label: Stop preview 4174
tasks.command: Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4174 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }

tasks.label: Start frontend preview 4174 fresh
tasks.command: Set-Location -LiteralPath 'E:/test/superM all/super M2/frontend'; npm run dev:live

tasks.label: copilot-build-frontend-preview
tasks.command: Set-Location -LiteralPath 'E:/test/superM all/super M2/frontend'; npm run build

tasks.label: copilot-start-backend-preview
tasks.command: Set-Location -LiteralPath 'E:/test/superM all/super M2/backend'; npm run dev

tasks.label: copilot-start-frontend-preview-4174
tasks.command: Set-Location -LiteralPath 'E:/test/superM all/super M2/frontend'; npm run dev:live

tasks.label: copilot-start-preview-stack
tasks.command: Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit','-Command',"Set-Location -LiteralPath ''E:/test/superM all/super M2/backend''; npm run dev"; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit','-Command',"Set-Location -LiteralPath ''E:/test/superM all/super M2/frontend''; npm run dev:live"; Write-Host 'Backend and frontend live preview started.'
